description: Small, yellowish, long legged, long tailed warbler. Yellowish all over, dullest on the back, brightest on the undertail coverts. Slight streaking on the breast. Thin (and difficult to see) yellowish wingbars. Long yellow supercilium, yellow throat, dark eyeline, brown cheeks, and a hint of rufous on the cap. The underside of the tail had diagnostic white square on the end and black base. Bobbed tail often. Spent most of its time foraging on a large bare patch of ground (it had snowed the day before) with juncos. Otherwise, it foraged in low bushes/trees. Often called its loud Chink! call.
photographer: Photographer: Matt Hofeditz, Matt Hofeditz, Matt Hofeditz, Matt Hofeditz
